name: SCC_ServicePaymentSelectionRes
title: SCC_ServicePaymentSelectionRes
syntax: void SCC_ServicePaymentSelectionRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Service Payment Selection Response is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
